game.title.description: Name of the Ludo game card on the home screen.
game.title.notes: Do not translate the game name.

game.description.description: One-line description on the Ludo game card.

game.playLabel.description: Accessibility label for the Ludo play button.

phase.roll.description: Phase indicator shown to the player during the roll phase.

phase.move.description: Phase indicator shown when the player must choose a piece to move.

phase.game_over.description: Phase indicator shown when the game has ended.

actions.roll.description: Button label to roll the die.

actions.rollLabel.description: Accessibility label for the Roll button.

actions.movePiece.description: Button label and accessibility label for moving a specific piece. index is 1-based.

actions.movePieceLabel.description: Accessibility label for the move piece button (lowercase variant).

actions.newGame.description: Button label to start a new game.

actions.newGameLabel.description: Accessibility label for the New Game button.

actions.quit.description: Button label to quit and return home.

actions.quitLabel.description: Accessibility label for the Quit button.

player.cpu.notes: CPU is an abbreviation — do not translate.

player.red.description: Color name for the red player.

player.yellow.description: Color name for the yellow player.

status.piecesInBase.description: Shows how many pieces are still in the home base (not yet on the board).

status.piecesFinished.description: Shows how many pieces have reached the center (finished).

status.yourTurn.description: Status text shown when it is the human player's turn.

status.cpuTurn.description: Status text shown when it is the CPU's turn.
status.cpuTurn.notes: CPU is an abbreviation — do not translate.

die.value.description: Shows what number was rolled on the die.

die.extraTurn.description: Badge shown when a 6 is rolled granting an extra turn.

die.noMoves.description: Notice shown when the player has no valid moves and their turn is skipped.

die.face1.notes: Do not translate — keep the Unicode die symbol.

die.face2.notes: Do not translate — keep the Unicode die symbol.

die.face3.notes: Do not translate — keep the Unicode die symbol.

die.face4.notes: Do not translate — keep the Unicode die symbol.

die.face5.notes: Do not translate — keep the Unicode die symbol.

die.face6.notes: Do not translate — keep the Unicode die symbol.

event.capture.description: Event notice shown when a piece captures an opponent's piece.

event.extraTurn.description: Event notice shown when a 6 is rolled granting another roll.

gameOver.youWin.description: Message shown in the game-over modal when the human player wins.

gameOver.cpuWins.description: Message shown in the game-over modal when the CPU wins.
gameOver.cpuWins.notes: CPU is an abbreviation — do not translate.

gameOver.body.description: Body text of the game-over modal explaining the result.

gameOver.playAgain.description: Button label to start a new Ludo game.

gameOver.playAgainLabel.description: Accessibility label for the Play Again button.

gameOver.home.description: Button label to return to the home screen.

gameOver.homeLabel.description: Accessibility label for the Home button in the game-over modal.

board.pieceLabel.description: Accessibility label for a piece on the board. player is the color name, index is 1-based.
